text:
In the quiet town of Whispering Pines lived a curious puppy named Whiskers. Whiskers had the happiest fur and a tail that wobbled just so. Every day, Whiskers bounded out of the nestbed his human had made him in their corner garden. He loved to explore.

One afternoon, while barking delightedly at a butterfly, Whiskers spotted something shiny. Someone had thrown a perfectly round bottle into the meadow. Intrigued, he dashed toward it.

As he reached the bottle, he couldn't believe his eyes—a tiny fox hole sat beside it. Creeping through, he discovered small creatures scurrying about beneath the dirt. A fox! He barked happily, ready to meet his new friend.

The fox, sensing the newcomer's excitement, emerged. Its tail flicked, and it gave a gentle chitter. "Hello," it whispered. "I'm Mittens."
